properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I believe in the Son I believe in the risen One I believe, I overcome By the power of His blood Amen, Amen

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm alive, I'm alive because He lives Amen, Amen Let my song join the One that never ends Because He lives

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was dead in the grave I was covered in sin and shame I heard mercy call my name He rolled the stone away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Amen, Amen I'm alive, I'm alive because He lives Amen, Amen Let my song join the One that never ends

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Because He lives (He lives) I can face tomorrow Because He lives (He lives) Every fear is gone I know (I know) He holds (He holds) My life (my life) My future in His hands

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Amen, Amen I'm alive, I'm alive because He lives Amen, Amen Let my song join the one that never ends Amen, Amen I'm alive, I'm alive because He lives Amen, Amen

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Let my song join the one that never ends Because He lives Because He lives
